{{Quote|My duty is to the gods, our leaders, and Domain Kraal.|Pilot Charat Kraal|<ref name="Stand">''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]''</ref>}}
'''Domain Kraal''' was a [[warrior caste]] [[Domain]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] that was in existence during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Around [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], Domain Kraal was tasked with holding the [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; First)|captured]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] as a colony and protecting it from the forces of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. However, after the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|fall]] of the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] world of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to the Yuuzhan Vong forces, New Republic forces under [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] defeated Domain Kraal at Borleias and took the world. Some members of Domain Kraal continued to harass New Republic forces near the planet afterward.

==Description==
Domain Kraal was a [[Domain]] made up of the [[Soldier/Legends|warrior]] caste of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].<ref name="Dream" /> Their [[Armor/Legends|armor]] was [[Color/Legends|colored]] with swirled silver and pink shades.<ref name="Stand" /> The Domain answered to the Yuuzhan Vong's warmaster, and was led by a [[Commander/Legends|commander]] at the [[Time/Legends|time]] of its defeat at Borleias.<ref name="Dream" />

==History==
{{Quote|Send Wyrpuuk Cha's fleet to crush them. Domain Kraal despises Domain Cha; having to admit a debt to Cha will be additional punishment for not holding Borleias as they should.|Warmaster Tsavong Lah|<ref name="Dream" />}}
Domain Kraal was present for the Yuuzhan Vong's [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of a [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] other than their [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|own]], and after the invaders [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; First)|captured]] the [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Borleias/Legends|Borleias]] from the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the domain was given control of the planet as a colony. There, Domain Kraal created a [[Domain Kraal base|base]] over the old New Republic/[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Borleias New Republic base|one]] after destroying it.<ref name="Dream" /> In [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]],<ref name="Date" /> following the [[Battle of Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|fall]] of the New Republic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to the Yuuzhan Vong, [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] [[Penzak Kraal]] and [[Charat Kraal]] were patrolling the [[Pyria system|system]] in [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]]. It was then that a New Republic [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] arrived in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], and prepared to sever Domain Kraal's hold on Borleias.<ref name="Dream" />

Though Penzak Kraal managed to send a warning to the [[Domain Kraal commander]] on Borleias, the New Republic forces landed on the planet after [[Battle of Borleias (Yuuzhan Vong War; Second)|defeating]] coralskipper [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] that were launched against them. Antilles' forces landed ground [[Troop/Legends|troops]] near the Domain Kraal base via the [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] ''[[Record Time]]'', and Domain Kraal's force of [[Warrior caste|warriors]] and at least one [[rakamat]] were soon defeated. Although Penzak was [[Death/Legends|killed]] in the fighting, other Kraal forces survived, such as Charat Kraal, and they managed to relay some information regarding the enemy's position to their superiors in the rest of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] as they hid in the system. As punishment for letting the system fall into enemy hands, [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] sent [[Domain Cha]], who was despised by Domain Kraal at large, to retake Borleias, so the Kraals would be in debt to Domain Cha.<ref name="Dream" />

However, Domain Cha failed to claim the planet, and before the Yuuzhan Vong sent former Warmaster [[Czulkang Lah]] to defeat the New Republic, remnants of Domain Kraal forces fought alongside Charat Kraal as they harassed the enemy forces and gained additional intelligence. When Lah arrived with his own force, Charat Kraal fought under him as they attempted to seize Borleias once more.<ref name="Dream" /> The world did indeed fall to them, though Lah and Charat Kraal both perished in the battle. Meanwhile, a small New Republic force used two sets of Domain Kraal [[Vonduun Skerr Kyrric|Vonduun crab armor]] to disguise themselves as they carried out a [[Mission to Coruscant (Yuuzhan Vong War)|mission]] on Coruscant.<ref name="Stand" />

==Behind the scenes==
Domain Kraal first appeared in [[2002]]'s [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''The New Jedi Order'']] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'', by [[Aaron Allston]].<ref name="Dream" />
